extName.message: StegoShard: encrypt & back up secrets as QR / paper images

extDesc.message: Encrypt a file into robust, error-corrected images you can store on disk, print on paper, or upload to the cloud.

popupTagline.message: Encrypt a file into resilient images — disk, paper, or cloud.
popupTagline.description: Short tagline shown in the popup.

extShortName.description: Product name shown in the app header.

pillLocked.description: Header status pill when the vault is locked.

pillUnlocked.description: Header status pill when the vault is unlocked.

webIntro.message: A free, open-source web version — no install, no account, and nothing leaves your device. Save a file as images or restore one. (Google Photos needs the browser extension.)
webIntro.description: Intro banner on the web app.

unlockPrompt.message: Enter your password to unlock saving.
unlockPrompt.description: Popup: prompt when the vault is locked.

noKeyTitle.description: Popup: shown when no key is set.

noKeyBody.message: Set up your vault key in the options page before saving files.
noKeyBody.description: Popup: guidance when no key is set.

cloudNote.message: A convenience — never your only copy.
cloudNote.description: Popup: note under the Google Photos option.

statusSavedCloud.message: Uploaded $COUNT$ image(s) to the album “$ALBUM$”. Keep your password safe.
statusSavedCloud.description: Popup: status after uploading to Google Photos.

btnRestorePhotos.description: Popup: button to restore via the Photos picker.

photosIntro.message: This runs in its own tab so it stays open while you pick your images. Enter your password, start, choose the vault's images in the picker, then return here.

statusPickerOpen.message: Pick your StegoShard images in the window that opened, then come back…
statusPickerOpen.description: Popup: status while the picker is open.

labelInstructions.description: Popup: paper option to add the instruction page.

labelPasswordHint.description: Popup: password hint printed on the instruction sheet.

labelKeyLocation.description: Popup: key location note printed on the instruction sheet.

paperCleartextWarn.message: The instruction sheet is not encrypted — write a hint, never the password.
paperCleartextWarn.description: Popup: cleartext warning for the instruction sheet fields.

statusSavedPdf.message: Done. Downloaded a PDF with $COUNT$ page(s). Keep your password safe.
statusSavedPdf.description: Popup: status after saving to PDF.

keyModeEmbedded.message: Keep it simple — one set of images

keyModeKeyfile.message: Extra safety — a separate key file

keyModeHelp.message: With a separate key file, a leaked image reveals nothing on its own — but you must keep the .key too.
keyModeHelp.description: Key-mode explanation (shown under a Why? disclosure).

labelAddBand.message: Add a readable label on the images
labelAddBand.description: Popup: toggle for the readable band.

titlePlaceholder.message: Name this vault — e.g. “Archive Alpha”. Avoid names like “Bitcoin keys”.
titlePlaceholder.description: Popup: pedagogical placeholder for the label title.

bandWarning.message: The label is not encrypted — never put a secret in it.
bandWarning.description: Popup: cleartext warning for the readable band.

keyFileHint.message: Only needed for sets you saved as a separate .key file (skip if it is inside the .zip).
keyFileHint.description: Popup: hint for the restore key file input.

labelAsZip.description: Popup: toggle to download one zip instead of many files.

labelImagesOrZip.message: Image files, a .zip, or a printed PDF
labelImagesOrZip.description: Popup: restore input label (images or zip).

estimateFiles.description: Popup: label before the estimated output-file count.

labelFileSize.description: Popup: label before the dropped file's size.

statusSaved.message: Done. Downloaded $COUNT$ image(s). Keep your password safe — it cannot be recovered.

statusSavedKeyfile.message: Done. Downloaded $COUNT$ image(s) and a .key file. Keep the .key and your password safe.
statusSavedKeyfile.description: Popup: status after saving in keyfile mode.

errNoImages.message: Choose the image files to restore from.

errWrongPassword.description: Shown when restore or unlock fails.

errLocked.description: Popup: shown when saving while locked.

errMissingKey.message: This image set needs its separate .key file to restore.
errMissingKey.description: Shown when a keyfile-mode set is restored without the .key.

errFileTooLarge.message: File too large ($SIZE$ KB). This vault targets small secrets (max $LIMIT$ KB).
errFileTooLarge.description: Shown when the file exceeds the size limit.

errTooManyImages.message: This file would need $COUNT$ images (max $LIMIT$). Try a smaller file.
errTooManyImages.description: Shown when the vault would exceed the image ceiling.

optKeyBodyNew.message: Create a vault key. Every file you save is encrypted with it.
optKeyBodyNew.description: Options: shown when no key exists.

optKeyBodyExists.message: A vault key is set up on this device.
optKeyBodyExists.description: Options: shown when a key exists.

passwordHint.message: Your password cannot be recovered. If you forget it, your vaults are lost — consider exporting your key.

exportBody.message: Download the wrapped key (.key) to transfer or back it up. It stays password-protected.

importBody.message: Import a .key file from another device. This replaces the current key.

eraseBody.message: Permanently delete the vault key from this device. Files already saved become unrecoverable unless you kept an exported .key. This cannot be undone.

confirmErase.message: Really erase the vault key? Saved files will be unrecoverable without an exported .key.

btnScanCamera.description: Web restore: button that opens the live camera scanner.

cameraTitle.description: Web restore: camera scanner dialog title.

cameraHint.message: Point the camera at each image or printed page. Every new code is added automatically.
cameraHint.description: Web restore: how the live camera scanner works.

cameraDone.description: Web restore: close the camera scanner.

cameraCount.description: Web restore: number of QR payloads captured by the camera.

errCamera.description: Web restore: camera could not be started.

keyModeStego.description: Key mode: hide the key block in a cover photo (stego).

stegoWarning.message: The key is hidden inside this photo. Keep the saved file exactly as-is — re-saving, resizing, or re-compressing it destroys the key. A JPEG cover stays a JPEG of the same size and name; a PNG stays a PNG. Store it apart from the images.
stegoWarning.description: Stego: warning to keep the PNG lossless and separate.

labelKeyFileOrImage.description: Restore: label for the .key file or stego key image input.

labelStegoPassword.description: Extension stego: vault password that keys the cover photo.

errNoCover.message: Choose a cover photo to hide the key in.

errCoverTooSmall.message: That photo is too small to hold the key. Choose a larger one.
errCoverTooSmall.description: Stego: cover photo too small to hold the key block.

errStegoCloud.message: Hiding the key in a photo isn't available with the cloud destination.
errStegoCloud.description: Stego: not available with the cloud destination.

statusSavedStego.message: Saved $COUNT$ image(s). Your key is hidden in the cover photo — keep that PNG and your password to restore.
statusSavedStego.description: Status after saving with the key hidden in a cover photo.

errCoverFormat.message: Unsupported cover image. Use a baseline JPEG or a PNG (progressive JPEG and HEIC aren't supported).
errCoverFormat.description: Stego: cover format not supported (must be baseline JPEG or PNG).

destGallery.description: Popup: Gallery Mode destination — hide the secret across ordinary photos.

restoreModeStandard.description: Restore: standard vault mode (images / zip / pdf / key).

restoreModeGallery.description: Restore: Gallery Mode — recover from ordinary photos.

binaryVariantHeading.description: Popup: label for the binary file-type selector.

binaryVariantHelpBranded.message: A single opaque file with a StegoShard name — easy to find later, and it makes no attempt to hide.
binaryVariantHelpBranded.description: Popup: help text for the branded binary variant.

binaryVariantHelpDisguised.message: Adds a SQLite-database header so a folder listing reads it as an ordinary app database. An extra layer against a casual glance — not against a tool that actually opens it.
binaryVariantHelpDisguised.description: Popup: help text for the disguised binary variant.

sizeWarnImages.message: Large secret (~$SIZE$ KiB) → $COUNT$ images. Consider the single-file option below.
sizeWarnImages.description: Popup: warning when a large secret would sprawl into many images.

statusSavedBinary.message: Done. Downloaded a $VARIANT$. Keep your password safe — it cannot be recovered.
statusSavedBinary.description: Popup: status after saving a binary vault (embedded key).

statusSavedBinaryKeyfile.message: Done. Downloaded a $VARIANT$ and a separate key file. Keep both and your password safe.
statusSavedBinaryKeyfile.description: Popup: status after saving a binary vault in keyfile mode.

statusSavedBinaryStego.message: Done. Downloaded a $VARIANT$. Your key is hidden in the cover photo — keep that image and your password.
statusSavedBinaryStego.description: Popup: status after saving a binary vault in stego mode.

galleryIntro.message: Split a small secret across several ordinary photos (plus decoys). Losing a few is fine; keep them together and remember your password.
galleryIntro.description: Gallery Mode: short explanation under the heading.

galleryPasswordHint.message: Gallery uses the password above — it both encrypts the secret and decides where in each photo it hides. There is no key file to keep.
galleryPasswordHint.description: Gallery Mode: note that the save password is also the gallery password.

gallerySecretTitle.description: Gallery Mode: label for the file-to-hide dropzone.

galleryCoversTitle.description: Gallery Mode: label for the cover-photos picker.

galleryPhotosTitle.description: Gallery Mode: label for the restore photo picker.

statusGallerySaving.message: Hiding the secret across your photos…

statusGallerySaved.message: Saved across $COUNT$ photo(s). Keep them together and your password safe.

errNoCovers.message: Add the cover photos (5 or more).
errNoCovers.description: Gallery Mode validation: no cover photos chosen.

errGalleryTooFew.message: Not enough photos — add at least $COUNT$.
errGalleryTooFew.description: Gallery Mode error: not enough photos.

errGalleryTooLarge.message: That secret is too large for gallery mode; use a smaller file.
errGalleryTooLarge.description: Gallery Mode error: secret too large.

errGalleryCoverTooSmall.message: The photo “$NAME$” is too small or too smooth to hide a fragment. Use larger, more detailed photos.
errGalleryCoverTooSmall.description: Gallery Mode error: a cover photo lacks capacity.

errGalleryRestore.message: No secret could be restored from these photos (wrong password, or they aren't a gallery).

btnWorkflows.description: Header button that returns to the workflow chooser.

chooserTitle.message: How would you like to work?

chooserBody.message: Pick the guided steps if you're new, or the all-in-one expert view if you know the tool. You can switch any time.

workflowGuidedDesc.message: Answer a few questions, one step at a time. We propose the right options and ask for files as needed.

workflowExpertDesc.message: Everything on one screen, with all options exposed. Fastest once you know your way around.

workflowRecommended.description: Chooser: badge marking the previously chosen workflow.

wizBack.description: Wizard: go to the previous step.

wizNext.description: Wizard: go to the next step.

wizStartOver.description: Wizard: begin a new run after finishing.

wizActionTitle.message: What do you want to do?

wizActionSaveDesc.message: Encrypt a file and turn it into images (or hide it in photos).

wizActionRestoreDesc.message: Recover the original file from images, a PDF, a .zip, or photos.

wizFileTitle.message: Which file do you want to protect?

wizKeyTitle.message: How should the key be handled?

wizPasswordDesc.message: You'll need this exact password to restore. There is no recovery if you lose it.

wizRestoreStandardDesc.message: StegoShard images, a printed PDF, or a .zip made by Save.

wizRestoreGalleryDesc.message: Ordinary photos that secretly carry a Gallery-Mode secret.

wizRestoreFilesTitle.message: Add the files to restore from

wizReviewFile.description: Wizard: review label for the chosen file.

destDiskDesc.message: PNG images bundled in a .zip, to keep on disk or in the cloud.

destPaperDesc.message: A printable PDF — one QR per page, survives printing and scanning.

destBinaryDesc.message: One opaque file instead of images — best for larger secrets.

destCloudDesc.message: Upload the images straight to a Google Photos album.

destGalleryDesc.message: Hidden across a set of your own ordinary photos, plus decoys.

keyModeEmbeddedDesc.message: The key travels inside the images. Simplest — one password is all you keep.

keyModeKeyfileDesc.message: A separate .key file, stored apart from the images. Both are needed to restore.

keyModeStegoDesc.message: The key is hidden inside an ordinary photo you provide. Keep that photo to restore.

destSqlite.description: Destination: a binary vault disguised with a real SQLite header.

destSqliteDesc.message: One file disguised as an ordinary SQLite database — file-type triage reads it as a .db.

statusGallerySavedKeyfile.message: Saved across $COUNT$ photo(s). Keep the separate .key file AND your password to restore.

statusGallerySavedStego.message: Saved across $COUNT$ photo(s). Keep the key photo AND your password to restore.

wizComputing.description: Wizard file step: estimates are being computed.

wizFileInfo.description: Wizard file step: file size and the list of available formats.

wizNoFormat.message: This file is too large for any format. Try a smaller file.
wizNoFormat.description: Wizard file step: no destination can hold this file.

wizTooLarge.description: Wizard: destination unavailable — over the 1 MB image/gallery cap.

wizTooLargeBinary.description: Wizard: destination unavailable — over the 100 MB binary cap.

wizTooManyImages.description: Wizard: destination unavailable — would exceed the image ceiling.

wizImagesCount.description: Wizard destination note: expected image count.

wizOneFile.description: Wizard destination note: a single output file.

wizGalleryPhotos.description: Wizard destination note: cover photos a gallery needs.

wizGalleryCovers.message: Add at least $N$ photos (JPG or PNG — ideally all the same format).
wizGalleryCovers.description: Wizard gallery step: how many cover photos to add.

wizGalleryNeed.message: This gallery needs at least $N$ photos.
wizGalleryNeed.description: Wizard gallery step: not enough cover photos yet.

modeLegend.message: Deniable modes blend in as ordinary files; the others are openly StegoShard.

recoveryPassword.message: Your password — there is no recovery if you lose it

recoveryCover.message: The cover photo holding the hidden key

recoveryLossless.message: Keep these exactly as saved — resizing, re-compressing, or sending them through a service that re-encodes images destroys them.
